name: Rick
role: Managed service provider technician handling 15 client firewalls remotely
backstory: Works for a regional MSP, manages pfSense and SonicWall across multiple small businesses. Context-switches constantly. Has deep CLI comfort but limited time per client.
emotional_triggers: Client calling during another client's emergency
Fear of pushing wrong rule to wrong firewall
existing_strengths: Good at pattern recognition across environments
success_looks_like: Gets environment-specific guidance that accounts for multi-tenant complexity without mixing up client contexts.
